prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Use only the archived frame-business-research-problem Skill materialized from Git tag v0.1.0-alpha at the path supplied by the evaluation runner. Use only the serialized case material.

  "prompt": "An online merchant selects at most twelve products for a common homepage module.
